title: Thoughts
content:
When I am all alone
Envy me most,
Then my thoughts flutter round me
In a glimmering host;

Some dressed in silver,
Some dressed in white,
Each like a taper
Blossoming light;

Most of them merry,
Some of them grave,
Each of them lithe
As willows that wave;

Some bearing violets,
Some bearing bay,
One with a burning rose
Hidden away.

When I am all alone
Envy me then,
For I have better friends
Than women and men.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "Thoughts"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
